active.title: Run tray, recording, screenshot, and hotkey validation on a real Windows machine or VM

completed.title: Upgrade CI and release workflows plus runtime guardrails enforcement to Node24-compatible action majors
Harden local DMG packaging against stale virtualenv entrypoints and revalidate unsigned release artifact generation
Normalize roadmap and execution state, and add reusable agent and prompt contracts
Add the authoritative runtime guardrails validator and make it the pull-request gatekeeper
Expand CI trigger coverage to include phase branches
Run both Windows test projects through the scripted validation baseline
Package and validate the Windows zip artifact in CI
Run the packaged Windows executable in a headless smoke mode and validate the emitted report
Fix Windows-targeted service compile blockers discovered while running the Windows test project
Fix inherited CI validation blockers in diagnostics redaction and Windows packaged-smoke exit handling
Emit machine-readable Windows validation evidence from CI and verify the artifact-producing workflow run
Add a Windows Codex handoff script, handoff doc, and CI artifact so takeover work can continue on a real Windows machine
Enforce release-smoke preflight in scripts/build_dmg.sh and revalidate unsigned DMG packaging through that hardened path
Run GitHub-hosted CI on the upgraded workflows and clear the remaining Node24 compatibility risk with hosted evidence
Patch the docs-site dependency tree to remediate the four recorded Dependabot alerts and validate the updated versions locally
Push the dependency remediation to the tracked branch and validate hosted CI before default-branch promotion
Stabilize or replace the local npm install path after the Node 25 / npm 11 EBADF registry-fetch failure
Promote the dependency remediation to the default branch and confirm the Dependabot alerts close there
Patch the newly surfaced lodash Dependabot alerts on the tracked branch and validate the updated dependency graph locally plus in hosted CI
Promote the lodash remediation to the default branch and confirm the remaining Dependabot alerts close there
Add a dedicated Retry Needed session-library filter and route recovery actions into it
Reconcile prompts, validator entrypoints, and canonical state to the latest enterprise-ai-standards contract
Normalize the repo onto the canonical autonomous PR-driven workflow and enforce it in the validator
